sections.heading: Secs. 2-85 to 2-88. Law Revision Commission established in Legislative Department. Members of the commission. Duties of the commission. Public and private assistance.

body: Sections 2-85 to 2-88 , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 1, 2023.
content.plainText: Sections 2-85 to 2-88 , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 1, 2023.
